---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem or Opportunity

What problem does this solve for mod authors, players, or maintainers?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think the feature should work.

## Target Audience

Who would benefit from this?

- [ ] New mod authors
- [ ] Experienced mod authors
- [ ] Game developers
- [ ] Tool maintainers
- [ ] Nexus Mods staff
- [ ] Other:

## Workflow Impact

Which workflow would this improve?

- [ ] Creating a mod
- [ ] Using templates
- [ ] Editing mod metadata
- [ ] Packaging files into an archive
- [ ] Uploading to Nexus Mods
- [ ] Documentation or help
- [ ] Build/release tooling
- [ ] Other:

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches or workarounds.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, references, or screenshots if useful.
